articles.title: On-Chain Metrics Suggest Bitcoin Bull Run Has Barely Begun, Says Crypto Trader Elliot Wainman
articles.description: Crypto trader and influencer Elliot Wainman is sharing his thoughts on Bitcoin’s price potential, asserting that the asset is nowhere near its bull cycle top. Wainman says on-chain metrics reveal that Bitcoin is just catching hold of its “true bullish momentum” after recently staging a recovery from early-March lows. articles.title: Komodo to Use Litecoin Notarizations to Protect Against 51% Attacks
articles.description: Komodo (KMD) platform will start using Litecoin for cross-chain notarizations The move is aimed at providing a cost-effective mechanism for 51% protection Komodo has been using Bitcoin but a need to reduce costs and scale has led to the switch to Litecoin The switch will happen in June of this year during Komodo’s Notary Node Season 5 The team at Komodo (KMD) has announced a plan to start using...
